title: erigeron poliospermus var. disciformis
intro: Erigeron poliospermus var. disciformis, also known as the White Fleabane, is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family that is native to the United States and Canada. This plant has been used in herbal medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, and is said to have medicinal properties that include reducing fever and relieving pain. The health benefits of Erigeron poliospermus var. disciformis include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce swelling, and support the immune system. Erigeron poliospermus var. disciformis can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or salve, and is often used in traditional herbal remedies to support overall health and well-being.
